title: 红糖花卷
creator: 洺择
summary: 这款红糖花卷蓬松暄软，散发着浓郁的红糖香味，深受小朋友喜爱。

cover.prompt: KitchenOS editorial food cover for 红糖花卷. Clean overhead composition, natural light, no text, no logos, no brand packaging.

steps: 将红糖用热水融化，放凉后加入耐高糖酵母。
将面粉与红糖水搅拌成絮状，揉成团。
放置在温暖环境中静置五分钟，然后在揉面垫上揉搓五分钟。
擀成长方形面饼，撒上红糖和少量干面粉。
将面饼整理好，分成约两厘米的面剂。
将两个面剂罗在一起，用筷子从中间压一下，扭动一下成为花卷形状。
将整理好的面团放在蒸锅上醒发，按压回弹后上锅蒸。
蒸好后，红糖花卷香气四溢。

title: Peanut Soba Tofu
creator: Weeknight Lab
summary: Fast noodles with broccoli, tofu, and a glossy peanut sauce.

cover.prompt: KitchenOS editorial food cover for Peanut Soba Tofu with soba noodles, tofu, broccoli, peanut sauce, limes. Clean overhead composition, natural light, no text, no logos, no brand packaging.

steps: Boil soba noodles until just tender, then rinse under cool water to stop cooking.
Press tofu dry, cube it, and sear until the edges are golden.
Steam or saute broccoli until bright green with a firm bite.
Warm peanut sauce with a splash of water until glossy and pourable.
Toss noodles, tofu, broccoli, and sauce together, then finish with lime.
notes: Seed recipe from demo data. Replace or add more via the CLI pipeline.
